results.name: 1-Mois
results.on_login: :put (",remc,70000,30d,70000,,Disable,"); {:local comment [ /ip hotspot user get [/ip hotspot user find where name="$user"] comment]; :local ucode [:pic $comment 0 2]; :if ($ucode = "vc" or $ucode = "up" or $comment = "") do={ :local date [ /system clock get date ];:local year [ :pick $date 0 4 ];:local month [ :pick $date 5 7 ]; /sys sch add name="$user" disable=no start-date=$date interval="30d"; :delay 5s; :local exp [ /sys sch get [ /sys sch find where name="$user" ] next-run]; :local getxp [len $exp]; :if ($getxp = 15) do={ :local d [:pic $exp 0 6]; :local t [:pic $exp 7 16]; :local s ("/"); :local exp ("$d$s$year $t"); /ip hotspot user set comment="$exp" [find where name="$user"];}; :if ($getxp = 8) do={ /ip hotspot user set comment="$date $exp" [find where name="$user"];}; :if ($getxp > 15) do={ /ip hotspot user set comment="$exp" [find where name="$user"];};:delay 5s; /sys sch remove [find where name="$user"]; :local mac $"mac-address"; :local time [/system clock get time ]; /system script add name="$date-|-$time-|-$user-|-70000-|-$address-|-$mac-|-30d-|-1-Mois-|-$comment" owner="$month$year" source="$date" comment="mikhmon"}}; send-login-data
